zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Pierpont於大約1588年出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親Thomas Pierpont25歲，母親Elizabeth Richardson25歲。她於1611年與Thomas Gibbons在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1656年4月25日在英國爾哈特福德享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Pierpont于大约1588年出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲Thomas Pierpont25岁，母亲Elizabeth Richardson25岁。她于1611年与Thomas Gibbons在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1656年4月25日在英国爾哈特福德享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pierpont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy called Pierrepont, e.g. Pierrepont (Seine-Maritime), Pierrepont (Calvados), Saint-Nicolas-de-Pierrepont (Manche), or Saint-Sauveur-de-Pierrepont (Manche), so called from Old French pierre ‘stone’ + pont ‘bridge’.

History: All the New England Pierpont lines seem to be descended from James and his sons John and Robert, who came to North America c. 1640. James also may have had a brother Robert who was part of that group. The southern Pierpo(i)nt family are descended from Henry, who came to the VA–MD region in 1635.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Pierpont was born about 1588, in London, England, her father, Thomas Pierpont, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Richardson, was 25. She married Thomas Gibbons in 1611, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 April 1656, in Hartford, Cheshire, England, at the age of 69.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pierpontが約1588年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Pierpontは25歳，母Elizabeth Richardsonは25歳であった。1611年にイギリスイギリスロンドンでThomas Gibbonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1656年4月25日にイギリスチェシュアイアハートフォードで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pierpont(이)가 대략 1588년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Pierpont(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Richardson(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1611년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Thomas Gibbons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1656년 4월 25일 영국 체실르 하트퍼드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pierpont nasceu aproximadamente 1588, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Pierpont, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Richardson, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Gibbons em 1611, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1656, em Hartford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Pierpont родилась около 1588 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Pierpont было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Richardson, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Gibbons в 1611 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 апреля 1656 г. в местности хартфорд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Pierpont nació aproximadamente 1588, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Pierpont, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Richardson, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Thomas Gibbons en 1611, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de abril de 1656, en Hartford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
